allow: Bash(find . -name '*.tsx' -not -path './node_modules/*' -exec sed -i '' -e 's/fontFamily: '\\''Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif'\\''/fontFamily: '\\''var\(--font-dm-sans\), "DM Sans", -apple-system, sans-serif'\\''/g' -e 's/fontFamily: "Georgia, \\\\"Times New Roman\\\\", serif"/fontFamily: "var\(--font-dm-sans\), \\\\"DM Sans\\\\", -apple-system, sans-serif"/g' '{}' ';')

Bash(find . -name '*.tsx' -not -path './node_modules/*' -exec sed -i '' -e 's/fontFamily: '\\''-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "SF Pro Text", sans-serif'\\''/fontFamily: '\\''var\(--font-dm-sans\), "DM Sans", -apple-system, sans-serif'\\''/g' -e 's/fontFamily: "-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, '\\''SF Pro Text'\\'', sans-serif"/fontFamily: "var\(--font-dm-sans\), '\\''DM Sans'\\'', -apple-system, sans-serif"/g' '{}' ';')
